attacking_style: Launches solo attacks from functioning breakaways on high-mountain climbs, with strong descending skills to hold gaps post-summit. Willing to commit fully to long-range efforts.
team_tactics: Operates within breakaway groups rather than relying on team setup; self-sufficient rider who creates own opportunities from early moves.
terrain_preference: High-mountain stages with technical descents that allow strong descenders to consolidate gaps created on climbs. HC climbs like Col de Portet suit his attacking profile.
vulnerability: Limited data, but reliance on breakaway success suggests potential weakness against GC riders in direct confrontation or stages with heavy team control.
key_patterns: Attacks solo from established breakaways rather than waiting for group sprint
Shows confidence and skill on technical descents to maintain/extend climbing gains
Capable of sustaining 1+ minute advantages solo to finish after mountain attacks
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated winning form with confident solo attacking and strong physical condition to hold significant gap
